description.value:
A longsword whose fuller looks like dried riverbed cracks. Legends say it drank a plague god's breath. It is a +3 weapon.

Curse. While attuned, any healing applied to the wielder becomes necrotic damage of the same amount instead (no save). Temporary HP granted by allies becomes negative levels of exhaustion (one level per 10 temp HP, round down, minimum 1) until the curse ends.

unidentified.description: A magnificent purple-guard longsword. It feels thirsty when you bandage a wound near it.

cursedMeta.decoyAppearance: Legendary +3 longsword sought by duelists who have cheated death once too often.
cursedMeta.trueNature: Healing on the wielder becomes necrotic damage of equal value; allied temporary HP becomes exhaustion until the curse is broken.

curse.name: Ashwell Inversion
curse.description: While attuned, whenever the wielder would regain hit points from a spell or magical effect they take necrotic damage equal to the healing instead. Temporary hit points granted by allies become levels of exhaustion (1 level per 10 temp HP, minimum 1) until the curse ends.

hints: Potions steam and blacken when brought to the wielder's lips, then heal others normally.

escalation.effect: Cure wounds rolls minimum on the wielder once.
Second wind restores half; the rest becomes necrotic self-damage.
